title: Add text note / description to board and lists on board
excerpt: I’ve come across numerous occasions where it would be useful to put a simple note  descriptor to a board and to various lists within a board.

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve come across numerous occasions where it would be useful to put a simple note descriptor to a board and to various lists within a board.

posts.author: jane.martel (Jane Martel)
posts.cookedHtml: Me, too! And, I’d like to add a notes to a group or a dashboard.
